summary_en: 9,057,600 shares acquired for ¥7.536B (ToSTNeT-3 market purchase, 1 May–19 May 2026). Cumulative to date under 16 Dec 2025 board resolution: 57,196,900 shares for ¥49.999B of ¥50B authorization (9.0% S/O limit). Program now closed. Year-to-date (FY24–FY27) ¥100B of ¥150B three-year plan completed; remaining ¥50B to be executed based on stock price and market conditions.
title_en: Notice of Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Completion of Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief: Oji Holdings Corporation announced on 21 May 2026 the completion of a share repurchase program authorized by board resolution on 16 December 2025. During the execution window of 1–19 May 2026, the company acquired 9,057,600 shares on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via market purchase (ToSTNeT-3) for ¥7.536 billion. Cumulative acquisitions under the 16 December authorization now total 57,196,900 shares for ¥49.999 billion against a ¥50 billion limit (9.0% of shares outstanding). The program is now closed. Oji stated that year-to-date cumulative buybacks from FY2024 through FY2027 have reached ¥100 billion of a planned ¥150 billion, announced in the medium-term plan of 30 May 2025. The company intends to execute the remaining ¥50 billion in future periods based on stock price levels and market conditions to enhance capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
